# Contributing to BRICE Sentinel

Thank you for your interest in contributing to an enterprise-grade, security-focused project.

## How to Contribute
- Fork the repo and create a feature branch
- Write clear, minimal, and secure code
- Add or update tests for new features or bugfixes
- Update docs and OpenAPI for any new endpoints or env vars
- Ensure all CI checks pass
- Submit a pull request with a clear description of changes and impact

## Code Style & Security
- Use 2-space indentation
- Prefer small, focused modules
- Validate all inputs and outputs
- Document non-obvious logic and decisions
- Never commit secrets or credentials
- Follow responsible disclosure (see SECURITY.md)

## Legal
- All contributions are under the Apache License 2.0 unless otherwise agreed
- By submitting a PR, you agree to the terms in LICENSE

## Reporting Issues
- Use the issue template
- Provide steps to reproduce, logs, and environment info

## Code of Conduct
- Be respectful, constructive, and professional
